translations.You cannot enable two-factor authenticat: You cannot enable two-factor authentication via email. You need to set a primary email address (in your personal settings) first.
translations.Could not enable/disable two-factor auth: Could not enable/disable two-factor authentication via email.
translations.Codes will be sent to your primary email: Codes will be sent to your primary email address:
translations.Apparently your previously configured em: Apparently your previously configured email address just vanished.
A new authentication code was just sent. Please enter it:
translations.Enter the authentication code that was s: Enter the authentication code that was sent to you:
